query.text: select @@fieldExternal from hrdgthct where stt_rec = @stt_rec order by @@orderByClause

declare @key char(13) select top 1 @key = stt_rec from hrkbctdg where stt_rec_nv = @key_nv and nam * 100 + ky <= @nam * 100 + @ma_ky order by nam desc, ky desc select a.stt, chi_tieu, muc_tieu, trong_so, 0 as diem_nv_dg, 0 diem_ql_dg, '' as ghi_chu, dien_giai, '' as stt_rec, line_nbr, bac, stt0, ma_loai, case when(b.stt = a.stt) then 0 else isnull(b.stt, case when bac = 1 then 1 else 0 end) end as readonly_yn from hrkbctdgct a left join ( select stt from hrkbctdgct where stt not in (select stt0 from hrkbctdgct where stt_rec = @key) and stt_rec = @key and stt0 = '' ) b on a.stt = b.stt where stt_rec = @key order by @@orderByClause

title.v: Lấy số liệu từ khai báo chỉ tiêu đánh giá$$90
